description_long: This is a thick, ornate book with a dark cover, reinforced by wooden or leather bands and metallic corner protectors. The book is open, revealing black pages adorned with swirling, glowing orange patterns that resemble magical or fiery energy. The exterior features a series of horizontal bands and circular motifs, giving it a fortified, almost arcane appearance. A prominent strap with a buckle is attached to one side, suggesting it can be securely closed. The overall design is reminiscent of a spellbook or ancient tome, with a mystical and robust aesthetic. The craftsmanship and decorative elements suggest it is a special or valuable item, possibly used for magical or ceremonial purposes.
description: A thick, ornate book with dark covers, glowing orange patterns on its open pages, and reinforced with bands and a strap. The design is mystical and robust, resembling a magical tome.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the book open with black pages and swirling orange patterns, as well as the reinforced corners and strap.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the book, the layered bands on the cover, and a glimpse of the glowing interior pages.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back cover with horizontal bands, circular motifs, and the attached strap, with the book slightly open.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness, banded cover, and glowing page edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features swirling, fiery orange patterns that evoke magical energy or flames, set against a dark background. The style is mystical and abstract, with no clear depiction of figures or objects.
